statement: Wiki homes mirror memory homes: public store → committed wiki/, full graph → overlay-repo wiki (--private)
rationale: The first wiki cut rendered PUBLIC-store records only — correct for committed pages, but owners with a private overlay (or shared mode, where the overlay IS the store) got a wiki blind to most of their graph. Requirement: the wiki must be able to read the private overlay when chosen, and a private wiki must live in the private repo.
reversal_conditions: Source decision dec_710fd0fb4f is superseded or explicitly retired.
limitations: TypeScript/JavaScript static graph only in Gate G1.
Dynamic calls and runtime dependency injection are not covered.
Legacy bridge preserves unified calls/imports/depends_on/contains reachability semantics.

audit.reason: Compiled from one structured Decision.conformance predicate.
